title: Google Sheets OAuth redirect URI mismatch
symptom: When attempting to sign in with Google, the user receives an 'Access blocked: This app's request is invalid' error indicating a redirect URI mismatch.
not_this_if: Using the correct redirect URI in Google Cloud Console
n8n is not running in Docker
root_cause: The redirect URI specified in the Google Cloud Console does not match the one used by n8n. This can happen if n8n is accessed through a different port or if the environment variable for the webhook URL is not set correctly.
fix_steps: Open your Docker configuration for n8n.
Add an environment variable named 'WEBHOOK_URL' with the value 'http://localhost:5680/'.
agent_instruction: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to match your n8n access URL and restart the container.
